subject: [PATCH v4 01/14] mm: decouple protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch decouples the protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING by introducing a new configuration option, CONFIG_ARCH_HAS_PTE_PROTNONE. This allows architectures that support present-but-inaccessible page table entries (protnone PTEs) to use this capability independently of NUMA balancing. The patch updates various architecture-specific code and Kconfig files to reflect this change, enabling six architectures to select the new configuration option and making the protnone infrastructure available for other uses beyond NUMA balancing.
